name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 29 shipped a saturated /goal /arc pass covering 13 of 17 ranked audit items: preseason-prediction receipts, a narrative continuity engine reviving a previously-dead event system, investment-driven scouting reveal, a real situational play-calling + fourth-down decision brain, a zero-backend return digest, ARIA tab semantics + a modal focus-trap utility, and six infra/truth fixes. what-if-replay, silent-error-surfacing, and service-scaffold-honesty are deferred to the next session.
nextMilestone: Pick up what-if-replay, silent-error-surfacing, and service-scaffold-honesty from docs/AUDIT_2026-07-01_SESSION29.md; verify football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying with a real received-message receipt before any SPARKED flip.
blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated until football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying is verified and post-push public route/domain state passes for playfranchisearchitect.com.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 29 verified default npm test 270/270 (up from 173) across all 5 shards with real per-shard exit codes (core 64/64, runtime 109/109, sim-contract 60/60, sim-realism 1/1, studio 36/36), Pages build/smoke, windows-hide guard, Wave guard, canon conformance (vector green, 0 GAP), secrets audit, blocker preflight. Playwright UI could not be verified locally this session — repeated launches hung with zero output in this sandboxed environment (93 lingering node.exe processes observed system-wide, likely resource contention from the session's many test invocations); not attempted to fix via bulk process termination (out of safe scope). This is a local-environment gap, not a regression signal — CI has its own documented Playwright install/launch workarounds and will verify the UI suite on push.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: npm run test:ui not verified locally this session (hung, killed after ~14 min combined across two attempts including a fresh browser install). Session 28 last verified it 9/9; no code change in this session should affect Playwright's ability to launch a browser, so this is treated as an environment issue, not a shipped regression.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

passed: node --check on every new/modified JS file (engine, runtime, public/lib, scripts)
npm test (270/270; core 64/64, runtime 109/109, sim-contract 60/60, sim-realism 1/1, studio 36/36 — real per-shard exit codes, run twice)
manual staged-file secret pattern scan (scripts/scan-secrets.mjs not vendored locally)
full calibration/monte-carlo/stats/ratings/career-realism/determinism regression suite verified green before and after the situational-playcalling engine change
timedOut: npm run test:ui — hung twice (5-minute timeout, then killed after ~9 more minutes following a fresh Playwright browser install); 93 lingering node.exe processes observed system-wide, most likely resource contention from the session's own many test invocations, not a code regression. Not chased further — bulk process termination was judged out of safe scope; CI will verify the UI suite on push.
failed: Caught mid-session, before commit: test/modal-manager.test.js relied on a module-scope globalThis.document assignment that another file's async test (test/create-api-client.test.js) deleted mid-shard under --test-isolation=none, producing a real failure on the second full-suite run. Fixed by having every test set document fresh as its first synchronous statement; re-verified green.

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
